articles.title_raw: Мирошник назвал военным преступлением удар ВСУ по автобусу с детьми
articles.lead_raw: Посол по особым поручениям МИД России отметил, что атака украинской армии была целенаправленной

articles.title_en: Miroshnik: Moscow faced an unprecedented intensity of attacks by the Ukrainian Armed Forces this week
articles.lead_en: In the Moscow region, 23 civilians were injured, noted the Ambassador at Large of the Russian Foreign Ministry
articles.title_raw: Мирошник: Москва на неделе столкнулась с беспрецедентной интенсивностью атак ВСУ
articles.lead_raw: В Московском регионе пострадали 23 мирных жителя, отметил посол по особым поручениям МИД России

articles.title_en: Miroshnik: more than 290 people were injured by Ukrainian Armed Forces strikes in the Russian Federation this week
articles.lead_en: This is the highest figure in 2026, noted the Ambassador at Large of the Russian Foreign Ministry
articles.title_raw: Мирошник: в РФ на неделе от ударов ВСУ пострадали более 290 человек
articles.lead_raw: Это наибольший показатель в 2026 году, отметил посол по особым поручениям МИД России

articles.title_en: Darchiev: Russia will do everything to ensure that the events of June 22, 1941 are not repeated
articles.lead_en: The Russian Ambassador to the United States stated this at the “Candle of Memory” memorial event.
articles.title_raw: Дарчиев: Россия сделает все, чтобы события 22 июня 1941 года не повторились
articles.lead_raw: Об этом посол РФ в США заявил на мемориальной акции "Свеча памяти"

articles.title_en: Darchiev: The USSR defended the right to determine its own destiny in the war against Nazism
articles.lead_en: The Russian Ambassador to the United States said that the Soviet people won thanks to fortitude
articles.title_raw: Дарчиев: СССР отстоял в войне с нацизмом право определять свою судьбу
articles.lead_raw: Посол России в США заявил, что советский народ одержал победу благодаря силе духа

articles.title_en: Russian security official, his BRICS counterparts to discuss security threats
articles.lead_en: Russian Security Council Secretary Sergey Shoigu is also expected to hold several bilateral meetings with heads of delegations from leading BRICS countries
articles.title_raw: Russian security official, his BRICS counterparts to discuss security threats
articles.lead_raw: Russian Security Council Secretary Sergey Shoigu is also expected to hold several bilateral meetings with heads of delegations from leading BRICS countries

articles.title_en: Russia crushes new incarnation of Nazism in Europe through special military op — envoy
articles.lead_en: Alexander Darchiev stated that "reckless figures in Germany, having forgotten the lessons of history, now dream of a 'Fourth Reich' and a new march eastward"
articles.title_raw: Russia crushes new incarnation of Nazism in Europe through special military op — envoy
articles.lead_raw: Alexander Darchiev stated that "reckless figures in Germany, having forgotten the lessons of history, now dream of a 'Fourth Reich' and a new march eastward"
